File Information
Collection: Grobase Edge — data-plane reliability corpus (1500+ vectors, data-driven)
Environment: Grobase edge (generated by run-edge-postman.sh)
Collection Description
Data-driven edge-case suite for the Grobase data plane. ONE parameterized request, run once per corpus vector via `newman --iteration-data postman/corpus/edge-corpus.json` (one iteration = one distinct edge case). Each vector carries: pathTemplate, body (raw JSON string — may be malformed on purpose), method, auth (key|none|anon-only|badkey), expectStatus[], jsonMatch[] (regexes that MUST appear), jsonNotMatch[] (regexes that must be ABSENT), neverServerError. The pre-request resolves {{dbId}}/{{crudTable}} from the environment, sets the auth headers, and rewrites the request URL+method+body for the iteration. The test asserts status ∈ expectStatus, every jsonMatch present, every jsonNotMatch absent, and (always) code < 500 — a 5xx on a hostile-but-well-formed input is itself a finding. Reliability: provision ONE tenant+key+mount and WARM the verify-cache before the run (run-edge-postman.sh), so all iterations are cache hits (no 2s verify-timeout → no 503).
Timings and Data
Total run duration: 3m 31.9s
